simple ≠ dumbed-down
simple = Σ ( max(signalᵢ) / min(noiseᵢ) )

About

I build serious software and unserious websites.
Originally from Kharkiv, Ukraine 🇺🇦
Currently living in Cebu, Philippines 🇵🇭

I work on Telebugs, a self-hosted Sentry alternative for error tracking.

Get in touch:

  • Email — silin@kyrylo.org
  • GitHub — kyrylo
  • X — @kyrylo
  • Bluesky — @kyrylo.org
  • Mastodon — @kyrylosilin
  • LinkedIn — Kyrylo Silin
